name: Biology
description: Essential vocabulary for cells, life and living systems.

group.definition: The basic structural and functional unit of all living organisms.
The molecule that carries the genetic instructions used in growth, development and reproduction.
A large molecule built from amino acids that performs most functions within living cells.
The process of cell division that produces two identical daughter cells from one parent cell.
The process by which plants convert light energy, water and carbon dioxide into glucose and oxygen.
The maintenance of a stable internal environment despite changes in external conditions.
A community of living organisms interacting with each other and their physical environment.
